creator: jon@xyinn.org
text:
Hey Cy,

Thanks for the reply. I actually did try to use the sync on start option before posting this email but it didn't "work". I suppose I would have needed to wait a lot longer like you said but given that ntpd has been running for a many months on this machine and the clock wasn't fixed, the clock became way off. Like 4 hours+. Given what I posted about me not being able to actually associate with any peers until I manually changed the clock, that's why I wrote this email in the beginning.
